description: Structured AI-assisted development framework with two-phase execution and web dashboard
notes: Scoop sets DOTBOT_HOME to the installed framework copy:
No manual DOTBOT_HOME setup is needed for the packaged install.
Set DOTBOT_HOME only when you intentionally want to route the source-checkout shim or MCP config to another checkout.
Projects can vendor their own runtime with: dotbot install runtime
Run 'dotbot status' to confirm the active tree.
